exception_title: mTLS PERMISSIVE mode on legacy metrics collector
compensating_controls: Service is read-only metrics collector; no customer data access; accessible only from monitoring namespace; migration to Istio-compatible version scheduled Q2 2025
review_outcome: Expired — migrated to Istio-compatible metrics collector July 2025

exception_title: Shared VPC for staging and production ML training overflow
compensating_controls: Separate subnets with security group isolation; Kubernetes namespace isolation; separate IAM roles per environment; VPC Flow Logs on all subnets; monthly review of cross-subnet traffic patterns; staging workloads use synthetic data only; production ML overflow accesses only training datasets (no customer PII in training data)
review_outcome: Renewed — compensating controls verified. No cross-subnet traffic anomalies detected. Security group rules confirmed. GPU cost savings of $367K/year justifies continued shared architecture.

exception_title: Temporary egress to PyPI for ML model dependency installation
compensating_controls: Restricted to specific EC2 instance; pip install logged; package integrity verified via hash checking
review_outcome: Expired — private PyPI mirror deployed September 28
